title: Five Spice Crispy Noodles
description: A quick-fix British dish featuring Chinese five spice powder, suitable for low-carb diets and providing umami flavor with a light touch of spiciness.

ingredients.name: Cooked noodles (al dente, about 8 ounces)
ingredients.notes: Use a low-carb noodle option if preferred.

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the five spice powder and stir until fragrant and slightly toasted, about 30 seconds.
Gently toss in the cooked noodles to coat them evenly with the five spice mixture.
Divide into serving bowls or individual portions.
Top each portion with scallions and chopped cilantro for additional freshness.
